⚗️ BABSPHARM Cloud
🎓 Student Learning Platform

Welcome to BABSPHARM Cloud

Your Ultimate Learning Platform

Access study materials, practice exams, and improve your academic performance all in one place — anytime, anywhere.

⚗️
About Us

About Our Platform

BABSPHARM Cloud is a student-focused platform created to help learners access academic resources easily. Our goal is to make study materials, past questions, and CBT practice available to students anytime and anywhere. With BABSPHARM Cloud, students can download lecture materials, practice exams, and stay updated with academic announcements.

Features

What You Can Do on BABSPHARM Cloud

📚

Lecture Materials

Download lecture notes and study documents for all your courses.

🧠

CBT Practice

Practice computer based exams anytime and track your score.

☁️

Cloud Resources

Access study materials stored securely online from any device.

💬

Contact Admin

Send questions or material requests directly to the admin.

🔔

Announcements

Receive important academic updates and platform news instantly.

🏆

Leaderboard

Compete with other students and climb the points leaderboard.

Why Us

Why Choose BABSPHARM Cloud

✔ Easy access to academic materials
✔ Organized study resources by course
✔ Fast and simple download system
✔ Practice exams to test your knowledge
✔ A growing student learning community
✔ Available 24/7 on any device
How It Works

Start in 3 Simple Steps

1

Register

Create your free student account in seconds.

→
2

Login

Sign in to access your personal dashboard.

→
3

Start Learning

Download materials and practice CBT exams.

Updates

Announcements

📢

Stay informed with the latest updates from the platform. Important notices about new materials, exam practice sessions, and system updates will be posted here. Login to see the latest announcements.

Support

Need Help?

If you have any questions, need a specific material, or want to report a problem, you can contact the admin directly. Our goal is to support students and improve the learning experience.

Everything You Need

Platform Features

Everything a student needs to study smarter, practice harder and perform better — all in one place.

📚

Student Tools

  • ⏱️ Study timer / Pomodoro countdown
  • 🃏 Flashcard maker for revision
  • 📝 Note-taking section
  • 📈 Study progress tracker
  • 🔖 Bookmark favorite materials
🧠

Quiz & Exams

  • 📊 Quiz result history chart
  • ⏳ Timed exam countdown
  • 👥 Score comparison with classmates
  • 🎯 Quiz difficulty levels
  • ❌ Wrong answers review page
🏆

Gamification

  • 🔥 Daily login streak rewards
  • 🎖️ Badge collection display
  • ✨ Points animation
  • ⬆️ Level up system
  • 💪 Weekly challenge
📢

Communication

  • 💬 Live chat between students
  • 🗨️ Comment section on materials
  • 🗳️ Poll/voting system
  • 📣 Admin announcements
  • 🔔 Push notifications
📊

Analytics

  • 📉 Personal study statistics
  • 📋 Weekly study report card
  • ⬇️ Most downloaded materials chart
  • 📈 Quiz performance graph

Uploaded Quiz Files
Loading
⚡ Quiz Import — AI-powered, sectioned format
📝 Paste format — supports sections: SECTION: Acid-Base Chemistry 1. What is NaCl? A. Sugar B. Salt* C. Water D. Acid 2. What is H2O? A. Water* B. Salt C. Acid D. Base SECTION: Thermodynamics 3. What is the SI unit of temperature? A. Celsius B. Fahrenheit C. Kelvin* D. Rankine Use SECTION: Name to split into sections. Mark correct answer with *. Without SECTION headers, questions auto-split every 5.
📄 Upload ANY file — PDF, Word, Image, TXT & more AI reads the file, extracts all questions, and auto-splits them into sections of 5 questions each.
📂

Drop any file here or tap to browse

.pdf · .docx · .txt · .png · .jpg · .xlsx · .csv · and more

✍️ Paste any quiz text — AI structures it into sections automatically Paste raw questions in any format (numbered, lettered, CBT-style, mixed). AI reads them, groups them into named sections of 5 questions each, and formats everything correctly.
✏️ Create Sectioned Quiz
📋 Each section has 5 questions. Students submit each section before moving to the next. Results shown after all sections.

🔗 How Referral Points Work
1️⃣ Each student has a unique code (e.g. BABS-JOHN)
2️⃣ New students enter the code at registration
3️⃣ When the referred friend completes any quiz → referrer gets +5 pts automatically
4️⃣ No quiz score points — only referrals & admin grants

🎛️ Allowed Sections
🤖 Shared Groq AI Key

Set a single Groq API key here and all students will use it automatically — they will never be asked to enter their own key. Get a free key at console.groq.com.

Key starts with gsk_ — stored securely in the platform database.
ℹ️ How It Works

📌 Admin sets the key once — it's saved to the platform database.

🎓 Students open the app — they get the key automatically, no prompt shown.

🔑 If no admin key is set — each student is asked to provide their own Groq key.

⚡ Groq is free — a single free-tier key supports thousands of AI requests per day.

📧 Brevo Email Settings

Paste your Brevo API key here and welcome emails will be sent automatically whenever a new student registers. Get your key at app.brevo.com → Settings → SMTP & API.

Key starts with xkeysib- — stored securely in your platform database.
🔔 Email Triggers

Choose which events automatically send an email to all students.

Loading
🧪 Test Welcome Email
📨 Send Email to All Students

Write a message and send it instantly to every student who has an email address on record.

📋 Blast History & Open Tracking

Open rates update as students open their emails. Refresh to see latest data.

Loading
📞 Contact Info

Update the WhatsApp number and email address shown on the login/register page.

Include country code, no spaces or + sign. e.g. 2348012345678
🔐 Change Admin Password

Update your admin login password. You will need to enter the current password to confirm.

🌧️ Raining Semester Courses

Add the courses for the Raining Semester here. They will automatically appear on the student Files page under the 🌧️ Raining tab once you save them.

Loading
➕ Add New Course
ℹ️ How it works
1️⃣ Add each course using the form above
2️⃣ Courses appear instantly on the student Files page under 🌧️ Raining tab
3️⃣ Students click any course card to filter files for that course
4️⃣ Delete any course anytime by tapping 🗑️ Delete
💡 Tip: Add courses now even before uploading files — students will see the course card but 0 files until you upload.
🤖 BABSPHARM AI Assistant

➕
Scroll down and tap "Add to Home Screen"
3
✅
Tap "Add" in the top-right corner to confirm
